title: Asian Geography
text: The largest continent in the world is {{blank-1}}. The most populous country is {{blank-2}} with over 1.4 billion people. The {{blank-3}} is the world's third largest ocean and borders Asia. The {{blank-4}} mountain range is the highest in the world, home to Mount Everest. The capital of {{blank-5}} is known for its mix of modern and traditional architecture.
